# 🌱 EcoTrack — Carbon Footprint Awareness Platform

A full-stack GCP-native platform designed to help individuals understand, track, and reduce their carbon footprint through AI-powered, personalized insights.

## 🏗️ Architecture Overview

This application leverages a serverless architecture on Google Cloud Platform to ensure scalability and high availability.

## 🚀 Key Features

* **Carbon Calculation Engine:** Real-time tracking of personal emissions.
* **AI-Powered Insights:** Personalized reduction tips generated by **Vertex AI (Gemini Pro)**.
* **Analytics Dashboard:** Data-driven visualizations powered by **BigQuery**.
* **Secure Authentication:** Seamless user management via **Firebase Auth**.

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Frontend** | React 18, Vite, TailwindCSS |
| **Backend** | Node.js, Express (Cloud Run) |
| **Database** | Firestore (NoSQL) |
| **AI/ML** | Vertex AI (Gemini Pro) |
| **Infrastructure** | Terraform (IaC) |
| **DevOps** | Cloud Build, Artifact Registry |

## 📦 Project Structure

```text
carbon-footprint-platform/
├── frontend/           # React SPA
├── backend/            # Express API (Cloud Run)
├── functions/          # Serverless logic (Carbon calc, AI)
├── infrastructure/     # Terraform IaC configurations
└── tests/              # Vitest & Playwright suites
